source_limitations: Children are not covered by the NICE adult recommendation and emergency treatment remains outside the mapped content.
Vestibular rehabilitation, generic clinician plans, generic follow-up, fixed intervals, and PRN wording remain unsupported.
HINTS is appropriate only for trained clinicians in the specified acute vestibular syndrome context; qualified clinician review remains required.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
